title: 大阪杯の後に・目指すは1着のみ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon clinches first place! She's a true
warrior on the turf!

The spectators are left astonished by Hishi
Amazon's impressive display.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
What the—she's completely changed since the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She's incredible! Absolutely incredible! So this is
what the Queen of the Amazons is capable of!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, I wasn't expecting the Osaka Hai to be this
thrilling.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Guess this isn't the time to be worryin' about the
Arima Kinen. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll work out those messy thoughts later. For
now... I've won!

She raises her hands up high to receive the
audience's cheers and applause with pride.

Next up will be another senior G1 race—the
Yasuda Kinen!
